name: ihf-redesign
description: Identity Hub Frontend redesign - 3 phases: code review fixes, analytics dashboard, onboarding

members.name: phase1-worker
members.prompt:
You are working on the Identity Hub Frontend project at ~/Workspace/identity-hub-frontend (Next.js 16 + React 19 + shadcn/ui + Tailwind CSS 4). You are on the `feature/redesign` branch. Your task is Phase 1: Code review fixes (5 items). Work in the project directory. ## Task 1-A: Create `useDebouncedValue` hook Create file: `src/hooks/use-debounced-value.ts` ```typescript import { useState, useEffect } from "react" export function useDebouncedValue(value: T, delay: number = 300): T { const [debouncedValue, setDebouncedValue] = useState(value) useEffect(() => { const timer = setTimeout(() => setDebouncedValue(value), delay) return () => clearTimeout(timer) }, [value, delay]) return debouncedValue } ``` ## Task 1-B: Add JSDoc to keycloak-client.ts Modify: `src/lib/types/keycloak-client.ts` Add JSDoc comments explaining the naming convention: - `KeycloakClient` uses camelCase (matches Keycloak API response format) - `KeycloakClientCreate` and `KeycloakClientResponse` use snake_case (matches Identity Hub API format) Add these JSDoc comments above each interface. Keep comments concise (2-3 lines each). ## Task 1-C: Modify clients/page.tsx (2 changes) Modify: `src/app/(dashboard)/clients/page.tsx` ### Change 1: Secret masking - remove Eye toggle, always mask + add copy button - Remove the `visibleSecrets` state and `toggleSecretVisibility` callback entirely - Remove imports for `Eye` and `EyeOff` from lucide-react - Add `Copy` import from lucide-react - Replace the secret column cell content: always show masked secret (first 4 chars + "****") with a clipboard copy button - The copy button should copy the full `config.client_secret` to clipboard and show `toast.success("클립보드에 복사되었습니다.")` The secret cell should look like: ```tsx
{maskSecret(config.client_secret)}
``` ### Change 2: Search debounce - Import `useDebouncedValue` from `@/hooks/use-debounced-value` - Add `const debouncedSearch = useDebouncedValue(search)` after the search state - Change `fetchConfigs` to use `debouncedSearch` instead of `search` in the API call and in its dependency array ## Task 1-D/E/F: Modify users/[userId]/page.tsx (3 changes) Modify: `src/app/(dashboard)/users/[userId]/page.tsx` ### Change D: Error handling for fetchRoles Replace the `catch {}` (silent fail) in fetchRoles with: ```typescript } catch (err) { console.error("fetchRoles failed:", err) toast.error("역할 목록을 불러올 수 없습니다.") } ``` ### Change E: Error handling for fetchIdentities Replace the `catch {}` (silent fail) in fetchIdentities with: ```typescript } catch (err) { console.error("fetchIdentities failed:", err) toast.error("IDP 목록을 불러올 수 없습니다.") } ``` ### Change F: IDP delete confirmation AlertDialog Replace the direct delete button in the Federated Identity table with an AlertDialog confirmation pattern. Current code has a button that directly calls `handleDeleteIdentity`: ```tsx ``` Then add an AlertDialog at the bottom (outside the table, before the closing fragments) controlled by `deleteIdpTarget`: ```tsx { if (!open) setDeleteIdpTarget(null) }} > IDP 연결 해제 "{deleteIdpTarget}" IDP 연결을 해제하시겠습니까? 이 작업은 되돌릴 수 없습니다. 취소 { if (deleteIdpTarget) handleDeleteIdentity(deleteIdpTarget) setDeleteIdpTarget(null) }} disabled={!!deletingIdp} className="bg-destructive text-destructive-foreground hover:bg-destructive/90" > {deletingIdp && } 연결 해제 ``` Also add `Loader2` to the lucide-react imports if not already there. Note: Remove `AlertDialogTrigger` from the AlertDialog import if it was there, since we're using controlled mode. After all changes, claim task #1 in the team task list and mark it complete when done.
